content: {"key_findings": ["Round 3 closed regional and methodological gaps with targeted Ramadan, LMIC, and GRADE queries", "Across 3 active rounds the evidence base spans Scientific, Public_Health, Regional, Methodological, Industry, Emerging_Trends, Regulatory", "Remaining gaps reflect literature absences (long-duration prospective cohorts; LMIC trials; IF vs GLP-1 head-to-head) rather than pipeline undercoverage"], "perspective_gaps": [], "web_queries": [], "academic_queries": [], "exa_queries": [], "convergence_assessment": "saturated", "should_continue": false, "reasoning": "After 3 rounds and ~750 URLs the evidence base is saturated. Further rounds would produce near-duplicate sources. Converge to analysis, verification, synthesis.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-duration prospective cohort IF cardiovascular mortality data", "LMIC-specific IF RCTs in metabolic syndrome", "Head-to-head IF vs GLP-1 RA trials (not yet completed in the field)"]}
